text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, it's actually happening! This dopamine rush
might never end!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The race of my dreams is coming true! Doto's first
G1 with Opera O... My oshis are gonna run
together in a G1!!!!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Let's go, Trainer! It's time to wave our light sticks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We arrive at Hanshin Racecourse, where the first
face-off between T.M. Opera O and Meisho Doto
is getting heated.

text_block_list.name: Opera O and Doto
text_block_list.text:
Daaaaah!
Hyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O rips around from the outside!
Meisho Doto is in second, holding down the
inside!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They're lined up, and it's over! T.M. Opera O
comes in first with Meisho Doto right behind her
in second!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O has won the momentous race by a
narrow margin.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: That... wasn't divine...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It was something much more. For a moment
there... when I was watching my two top oshis give
their all against each other...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I... even forgot how moe they are... That's how
much it affected me...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Doto, you've done well to arrive at the foot of my canopy.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This is the meeting of chance I was promised. Our
tale begins here!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
None but I shall run ahead of you, and none shall
outpace me but you!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Opera O! I'm... so, so, so sorry to have kept you
waiting!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But now that I've made it, I'll keep moving toward
you... step by step!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I want to become... someone I can be proud of!
And I... I need you for that!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So, please, run with me again... and again and
again and again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd goes wild as the two announce their
rivalry.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Is this... the essence of Umamusume?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Or is it unique to Opera O and Doto?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My ears are getting... hot... All the excitement has
gone to my head.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It must be from this fated match-up, right? It must
be because they're so special...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Digital, you have my thanks for attending this
premiere of ours.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It's your turn next. Show us how you twirl atop the
sand.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Opera O...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Do your best, Digital. I'm planning to learn
something from watching you run on dirt too.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
O-okay. I'm not sure I can put on a race as divine
as you two...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Still, watching your show—your race—has really
energized me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we've been passed the baton, and we're
up next to perform in the Japan Dirt Derby. Our
search for the source of Umamusume greatness
continues.
